resultList.dtldesc: Indulge in luxurious living with this exceptional 3 BHK Flat for Sale in the prestigious project named My Home Avatar, located in Narsingi, Hyderabad. Featuring premium parking facilities and designed to be vaastu compliant, this residence offers a harmonious blend of sophistication and comfort, complemented by a desirable west-facing orientation that captures the essence of elegance and tranquility.::::::Property Specifications::::::Encompassing a super area of 1834 sqft across an impressive 30 floors, this unfurnished residence promises a canvas for customization and personalization. The three bedrooms, are designed for comfort and functionality, and three bathrooms in this flat two are attached to bedrooms for privacy, and one is common, all designed in a modern Western style for contemporary living. An additional balcony attached to the living area offers picturesque views overlooking the clubhouse, providing a serene space to unwind. ::::::The spacious living cum dining area enhances the overall sense of grandeur. The kitchen, equipped with a piped gas connection and utility area, is designed for both convenience and style. Vetrfiled tiles adorn the flooring, creating an aesthetic appeal that is both sophisticated and easy to maintain. The presence of an extra window enhances natural light and ventilation, contributing to a refreshing and airy ambience.::::Facilities ::::::The facilities are abundant, starting with open parking for residents. Enjoy uninterrupted living with 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, complemented by a 100% power backup facility. Security is paramount, with guards, CCTV installations, and per tower, four lifts ensuring a safe and secure environment.::::::The My Home Avatar project goes beyond the ordinary, offering an array of amenities that include a helipad, conference room, banquet hall, cafeteria/food court, service/goods lift, reserved parking, air conditioning, visitor parking, internet/Wi-Fi connectivity, laundry service, waste disposal, and maintenance staff.::::::For those seeking luxury, this residence provides unique features like a private pool, private jacuzzi, sea-facing views, a sky deck, private terrace/garden, theme-based architecture, a bar/lounge, clubhouse, and DTH television facility. Enjoy the lush surroundings with a park, water storage, RO water system, rainwater harvesting, fingerprint access, and intercom facility.::::::Locality ::::::The project is strategically located, with the landmark "My Home Avatar" and ORR nearby. Schools and hospitals are conveniently situated in the vicinity, ensuring access to quality education and healthcare. Malls and supermarkets cater to your shopping needs, while banks and ATMs are easily accessible for financial transactions. Public transport is readily available, and the metro station within 100 meters enhances connectivity. ::::
